# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: install.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: Installation
metadata:
  name: linkerd
spec:
  admin:
    ingress:
      enabled: true
      annotations:
        nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/auth-type: "basic"
        nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/auth-secret: linkerd-basic-auth
        nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/auth-realm: "Protected Area"

installCRDs: true

components:
  - cluster-wide-proxy
  - identity-service
  - control-plane

serviceProfiles:
  - name: external
    selector:
      matchLabels:
        app: istio-ingressgateway

installationspec:
  global:
    enableTrafficSplitting: false
    annotations:
      linkerd.io/inject: enabled

trafficPolicies:
  - name: linkerd-server-policy
    spec:
      selectors:
        - matchExpression:
            values:
              - 'service.linker.sh/*'

trafficPolicies:
  - name: linkerd-authorization-policy
    spec:
      selector:
        - matchLabels:
            app: web
      actions:
        - allow
